name: Gym Bench V-Taper Mirror Selfie
description: Athletic woman taking gym mirror selfie seated on bench with deep forward lean showing V-taper back definition
input_prompt: athletic woman gym mirror selfie on bench showing back muscles

subject.description: single athletic young woman mid-20s with lean athletic frame, medium brown hair in low ponytail through dark baseball cap

physical_details.body_type: athletic, lean, slim waist, toned legs

skin.texture: natural skin texture with subtle workout sheen
skin.details: visible_areas: full back, shoulders, upper arms, thighs, lower legs; lighting_effect: highlights on shoulder blades and lats with soft shadow line along spine

hair.style: low ponytail through dark baseball cap, slightly flattened from training

face.details: eyes: focused, calm, looking down toward phone screen; mouth: neutral, soft

clothing.details: thin crisscross straps, large open back exposing shoulder blades to lower back; effect: sleek sporty frame emphasizing back definition

accessories: light gray sweatshirt tied around waist with sleeves knotted at hips
smartphone with triple-camera module held close to cheek/jawline

pose_action.position: seated sideways on flat bench in front of wall mirror
pose_action.camera_relation: mirror reflection, slight side profile, three-quarter body vertical portrait
pose_action.dynamic_elements: V-taper back silhouette with visible lat and shoulder-blade lines; body_mechanics: bench_placement: padded flat bench runs left-to-right across frame, parallel to bottom edge, in lower third, hip_position: hips pushed slightly back, sitting near center of bench, torso_angle: deep forward hip-hinge, 45-60 degrees from vertical, chest: close to front thigh with small gap, shoulders: slightly in front of front knee in mirror view, subtly rolled back and down (scapula depressed), arm_support: forearm/elbow resting on front thigh, head: lowered with cap brim pointing down toward phone

environment.location: modern gym weight area with large wall mirror
background: dumbbell rack or weight equipment visible in mirror

lighting.quality: controlled contrast to sculpt back muscles
effects: highlights on shoulder blades and lats

camera_technical.resolution: crisp digital detail, subtle grain in darker areas
camera_technical.depth_of_field: moderate, subject sharp, background slightly subdued

mirror_rules.reflection_integrity: mirror reflects same single subject, not a second person
mirror_rules.text_handling: any text readable in correct orientation, no mirrored letters

realism_anchors: single person only in entire image

flattened_prompt: smartphone gym mirror selfie, single athletic young woman mid-20s, lean athletic build V-taper back, medium brown hair low ponytail through dark baseball cap, focused calm expression looking at phone, black long-sleeve open-back top thin crisscross straps exposing full back shoulder blades lats, black shorts white piping, gray sweatshirt tied at waist, seated sideways on flat bench deep forward hip-hinge 45-60 degrees, chest close to thigh forearm on thigh, phone held close to cheek, visible lat and shoulder-blade definition shadow line along spine, modern gym wall mirror dumbbell rack overhead lights rubber floor, cool overhead lighting sculpting back muscles, crisp digital detail subtle grain, 9:16 vertical
negative_prompt_flat: two people, duplicate person, upright posture, arm extended, diagonal bench, bad anatomy, extra limbs, plastic skin, overexposed

color_palette.skin: light to light-medium with workout sheen

ideogram.prompt: Athletic young woman taking gym mirror selfie seated sideways on flat bench, deep forward lean showing V-taper back with visible muscle definition, wearing black open-back top with crisscross straps, dark cap with ponytail, modern gym with wall mirror and weights, cool overhead lighting

reve.prompt: Fitness photography in the style of authentic gym progress shots, athletic woman mirror selfie on bench showing defined back, black athletic wear, cool overhead lighting, disciplined training aesthetic

grok-imagine.prompt: Athletic woman gym mirror selfie seated on bench with deep forward lean, black open-back top showing V-taper back muscles, cap with ponytail, gym weight area with wall mirror, cool overhead lighting, smartphone photo style

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A single athletic young woman in her mid-twenties takes a gym mirror selfie. She has a lean athletic frame with a defined V-taper back, and medium brown hair pulled into a low ponytail through a dark baseball cap. Her expression shows quiet concentration as she looks down at her phone screen. She wears a black long-sleeve open-back top with thin crisscross straps that expose her full back from shoulder blades to lower back, paired with black athletic shorts featuring white piping along the hem. A light gray sweatshirt is tied around her waist with sleeves knotted at her hips. She sits sideways on a flat padded bench that runs horizontally across the frame, leaning forward in a deep hip-hinge at approximately 45-60 degrees from vertical, with her chest close to her front thigh. Her forearm rests on her thigh for support while she holds a smartphone with triple-camera module close to her cheek. The modern gym features a large wall mirror with visible seams, dumbbell racks, overhead fluorescent strip lights, and rubber flooring in cool gray and charcoal tones. Cool overhead lighting sculpts her back muscles with highlights on shoulder blades and lats, and a soft shadow line along her spine. Her skin shows a subtle workout sheen with natural texture. No second person. No duplicate reflection. No plastic skin. Anatomically correct single figure only.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Single athletic woman taking gym mirror selfie seated sideways on flat bench with deep forward lean showing V-taper back definition, black open-back top with crisscross straps exposing shoulder blades and lats, dark cap with ponytail, black shorts white piping, gray sweatshirt tied at waist, holding phone near face, modern gym wall mirror with dumbbell rack and overhead lights, cool lighting creating muscle definition shadows, smartphone photography aesthetic, one person only not duplicated in reflection
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A single athletic young woman captures a gym mirror selfie while seated on a flat bench. She leans forward in a deep hip-hinge, showcasing her defined V-taper back through a black open-back top with crisscross straps. Her medium brown hair is pulled through a dark baseball cap into a low ponytail. She wears black shorts with white piping and a gray sweatshirt tied at her waist. The modern gym features wall mirrors, dumbbell racks, and cool overhead lighting that sculpts her back muscles with highlights and shadows. Authentic smartphone photography with crisp digital detail. Exactly one person in the entire image.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the gym environment to have warm wooden accents and natural lighting from windows while keeping the woman's pose, athletic wear, and V-taper back definition exactly the same. Preserve the single-person composition and mirror selfie framing.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed pose mechanics (torso angle, shoulder position, bench placement), specific athletic wear details
2_realism_anchors: 'visible muscle definition', 'workout sheen', 'shadow line along spine', 'single person constraint'
3_technical_camera: 'smartphone mirror selfie', 'crisp digital detail', 'moderate depth of field'
4_negative_hygiene: extensive list preventing duplicate people, bad anatomy, incorrect posture
5_spatial_consistency: precise bench positioning 'horizontal left-to-right in lower third', exact torso angles
6_lighting_storytelling: 'cool overhead gym lighting' = focused training atmosphere
7_mirror_rules: explicit reflection integrity and single-subject constraint
